headline: Game Studio Celebrates Spain's World Cup Victory with Paid Day Off
meta_description: Baldur's Gate 3 studio rewards Spanish employees with an extra day off following their country's World Cup success.
summary_short: The studio behind the acclaimed game Baldur's Gate 3 gave Spain-based employees a day off to celebrate their nation's World Cup achievement.
body:
In a show of team spirit, the studio behind Baldur's Gate 3 granted Spanish employees an unexpected gift: a day off to celebrate their country's World Cup victory.

The gesture reflects a workplace culture that values major cultural moments alongside work. Rather than business as usual, the company recognized that some victories deserve to be savored—especially one that galvanizes an entire nation.

This decision extends beyond a simple morale boost. It acknowledges that employee wellbeing includes space for national pride and community connection. By stepping back from work schedules to honor a collective achievement, the studio demonstrated that games aren't the only thing worth celebrating.

The move reveals how forward-thinking companies are finding ways to connect with their teams on a human level, understanding that moments like these matter deeply to their people.
